# Vertex AI Release Notes - Feature Announcements

## March 25, 2026
- **Lyria 3 Audio Generation**: Two new models released for music synthesis - `lyria-3-pro-preview` (184 seconds) and `lyria-3-clip-preview` (30 seconds)

## March 24, 2026
- **Image Generation Endpoint Deprecations**: Multiple Imagen endpoints (versions 3.0 and 4.0) being discontinued June 30, 2026, with migration to `gemini-2.5-flash-image` recommended
- **Video Generation Endpoint Deprecations**: Veo 3.0 and 2.0 models deprecated, with guidance to migrate to `veo-3.1-generate-001`

## March 16, 2026
- Vertex Explainable AI marked as deprecated

## March 12, 2026
- Partner model evaluation support for Anthropic and Llama models in Gen AI evaluation service

## March 5, 2026
- Vector Search 2.0 generally available with collections, auto-embeddings, and hybrid search capabilities

## March 3, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite released as most cost-efficient Gemini model
- Video generation endpoint deprecations announced (April 2, 2026 deadline)

## February 26, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Flash Image preview for improved image generation

## February 19, 2026
- Gemini 3.1 Pro preview with 1M token context window for complex reasoning tasks

## February 18, 2026
- Vertex AI Agent Engine Code Execution now generally available

## January 23, 2026
- Virtual Try-On model promoted to GA with new `virtual-try-on-001` endpoint

## Last Fetched
2026-03-31
